titleStmt.title: SII 9.146: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 146. (A.R. No. 439 of 1920.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR THE RUINED TEMPLE OF CHENNAKESAVA AT HAVALIGI, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 4, Siddhārthi, Pushya, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1079 December 25, Wednesday. Sōmavāra is apparently a mistake for Saumyavāra. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. His feudatory the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Maṅgarasa of the Chōḷa family, who was ruling over Rodda three-hundred and Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred, is stated to have made a grant of land for the service of the god Pañchaliṅga-Siddhēśvara to the teacher Bēvinajiya. It is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrī
pritvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāsrayakulatilaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhu
vanamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
ttamire tatpā
dapadmō ḷappa sva
sti sama paṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara
yūrppūravarēsvaraṁ
hājanakīcakavri
kōdaraṁ kāsyapakuḷapavitra suja
naykamitraṁ kaṁbaḷapaṟeghō
śaṇaṁ maṇḍaḷikabhūśa
ṇaṁ rājamāndhāta ni
ndiṟivāta vīranārā
yaṇa caturbhārā
yaṇa ripunripa
kāḷadaṇḍa sikhisi
khadhvaja śiṁghalāṁchana
brājita maṁḍaḷika
baṁṭara bhāva gaṇḍara
cōḷēsvaradēvalabdhavarapra
sādaṁ mrigamadāmōda
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvara maṁgarasaru rodda mū
nūṟu kaṇiyakallu
mūnūṟuṁ Antu Eraḍa
ṟunūṟuṁ sokhasaṁkhathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire cāḷukyavi
kramavarṣada 4 neya
siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada
pusyadamāsye sōma
vārāmuttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāntiyoḷu paṁ
caliṁgasiddhēsvaradēvara
Alliya Ācāryya
bēvinajīyargge pā
lutuṟuvina beṭṭa
diṁ mūḍa biṭṭa
ya mattarkkeyyi
mūvattu tōṭa
Ondhu gāṇa Oṁdu .
svadatta paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasu
ndharā ṣaṣṭivarṣa
sahasrāṇi
miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . Ī dharmmamaṁ
Ūroḍeya meṭṭime
ya bammagāvuṇḍaṁ pra
tipāḷisuvar
būḷama sara
ya maṁgimayaṁ
bareda .
Digital edition of SII 9.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
